Localization.Description: A user logged in or logged out via SSO

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the system via Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the system via Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of the system via Single Sign-On (SSO) on vCenter host {event_src.host}
